codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly fulfills VAL-PARAM-001 (Placeholder Detection) and VAL-PARAM-002 (Valid Parameter Names Only). The regex pattern (?:^|[^:]):([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]*) correctly handles PostgreSQL :: cast operator by ensuring the colon is not preceded by another colon. Deduplication preserves order of first appearance. Empty slice (not nil) returned for consistent JSON serialization. Clear error messages identify invalid characters in parameter names.

summary: PASS: Clean implementation of parameter detection and validation. The regex pattern correctly handles edge cases including PostgreSQL :: cast operator, deduplication with order preservation, and provides clear validation error messages. Tests are comprehensive with 47 test cases covering all expected behaviors. Worker followed TDD procedure correctly (RED → GREEN).
